response.overview: Laura is in love with Olga but hasn't told her yet. Oliver feels that his relationship with David is becoming codependent and that they should distance themselves. Luna hides her insecurity by chasing lead roles, while Xenia prefers to go unnoticed. Noah is the glue that holds this acting company together, although his obsession with reaching THE ZONE is precisely what triggers the tragedy.  To achieve THE ZONE, individually or together, the actors perform different scenes and monologues from plays that resonate particularly with them. When some of them succeed, they must face the repercussions of the plays and characters they chose to portray.
response.title: La Zona
